name: ola-olabinjo-command-centre
description: Ola Olabinjo Investment — Family Office Command Centre

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.preview: npm run build -w client && npm run preview -w client
scripts.start: npm run build -w client && npm run start -w server
scripts.serve:portal: npm run build -w client && npx serve client/dist -c serve-portal.json
